summary: Completed the v0.1.0 pre-release audit, documented scope/findings/module-depth review/release recommendation in docs/release-audit.md, and removed stale dead_code suppressions without changing behavior.
acceptance_status: docs/release-audit.md exists and records audited scope, findings, fixes made, remaining risks, and release recommendation.
Module-depth audit explicitly uses module, interface, seam, depth, leverage, and locality vocabulary.
Dirty/broken/dead/redundant/slop scan is documented; stale lint suppressions were fixed and remaining risks are justified.
No public CLI, daemon IPC, JSON Issue Slice, or runner contract behavior/schema changes were made.
Full verification profile passed and the worktree is clean after commit.

findings.description: Removed stale dead_code suppressions from Job.kind and Runner; both are used.
Removed stale dead_code suppression from worktree_remove; cleanup code calls it.
workflow::Manager is large; documented as an internal locality risk requiring a separate architectural slice, not a release blocker.
ResultData text/usage are retained but not surfaced; documented as low-severity telemetry dead weight.

assumptions: Committed repository code and release workflow assets are the authorized audit scope; runtime/build artifacts are excluded.
Cargo was invoked with $HOME/.cargo/bin on PATH because cargo was not on the default worker PATH.
Attribute-only cleanup is non-behavioral and does not change public contracts.
